channel.title: NPR Topics: National
channel.description: NPR coverage of national news, U.S. politics, elections, business, arts, culture, health and science, and technology. Subscribe to the NPR Nation RSS feed.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Want to own a real T. rex? It could cost you $30 million
item.description: The Tyrannosaurus rex fossil known as "Gus" will go up for auction on Tuesday. It's not the first time dinosaur bones have been sold to the highest bidder.
item.content:encoded:
The Tyrannosaurus rex fossil known as "Gus" will go up for auction on Tuesday. It's not the first time dinosaur bones have been sold to the highest bidder.

(Image credit: Timothy A. Clary)
item.dc:creator: Chandelis Duster

item.title: Georgia's unique in the American Revolution told through its historical markers
item.description: NPR's Don Gonyea speaks with Andrew Iden, Executive Producer of Marked!: The Podcast, which examines Georgia's role in America's revolutionary period through the 2,000 roadside historical marker.
item.content:encoded: NPR's Don Gonyea speaks with Andrew Iden, Executive Producer of Marked!: The Podcast, which examines Georgia's role in America's revolutionary period through the 2,000 roadside historical marker.
item.dc:creator: Don Gonyea

item.title: Airline consolidation now rules the skies. Has it been good for passengers?
item.description: The four biggest U.S. airlines control an unprecedented 75% of the market. The industry's critics say consolidation is bad for passengers, but the airlines insist there's still healthy competition.
item.content:encoded: The four biggest U.S. airlines control an unprecedented 75% of the market. The industry's critics say consolidation is bad for passengers, but the airlines insist there's still healthy competition.
item.dc:creator: Joel Rose

item.title: Campaign text messages could soon get more effective — and annoying
item.description: Taught to sound like a candidate, bots are engaging voters with personalized text messages, making AI-generated texting conversations the latest tool political campaigns are using to connect.
item.content:encoded:
Taught to sound like a candidate, bots are engaging voters with personalized text messages, making AI-generated texting conversations the latest tool political campaigns are using to connect.

(Image credit: Charly Triballeau)
item.dc:creator: Maham Javaid

item.title: Sen. Lindsey Graham of South Carolina, Trump ally and foreign policy hawk, dies at 71
item.description: His office said Graham died Saturday night after a "brief and sudden illness." The Republican senator was instrumental in enacting Trump's policy and staffing priorities.
item.content:encoded:
His office said Graham died Saturday night after a "brief and sudden illness." The Republican senator was instrumental in enacting Trump's policy and staffing priorities.

(Image credit: Jeffrey Collins)
item.dc:creator: Eric McDaniel

item.title: Messi and Argentina survive another close call to reach the World Cup semifinals
item.description: Argentina was taken to the brink in its first two knockout games. In Saturday's quarterfinal against Switzerland, the Albiceleste survived again to advance to the semis, where they will face England.
item.content:encoded:
Argentina was taken to the brink in its first two knockout games. In Saturday's quarterfinal against Switzerland, the Albiceleste survived again to advance to the semis, where they will face England.

(Image credit: Odd Andersen)
item.dc:creator: Becky Sullivan

item.title: 200 young campers rescued as flooding hits parts of Missouri and Kentucky
item.description: A historic rainfall event has left communities across several Missouri counties underwater and prompted water rescues, including an evacuation of a summer camp.
item.content:encoded:
A historic rainfall event has left communities across several Missouri counties underwater and prompted water rescues, including an evacuation of a summer camp.

(Image credit: Jon Cherry)
item.dc:creator: Chandelis Duster

item.title: In a nailbiter, England moves on to the World Cup semifinals, defeating Norway 2-1
item.description: England's Jude Bellingham has done it again. Scoring both of his team's goals in a thrilling quarterfinal against Norway that needed extra time. It was the first World Cup meeting between the two.
item.content:encoded:
England's Jude Bellingham has done it again. Scoring both of his team's goals in a thrilling quarterfinal against Norway that needed extra time. It was the first World Cup meeting between the two.

(Image credit: Richard Pelham)
item.dc:creator: Russell Lewis

item.title: Justice Department subpoenas New York Times reporters over Air Force One reporting
item.description: The Times says federal agents turned up on the doorsteps of several of its journalists to force grand jury testimony next week over their coverage of the Air Force One plane gifted to Trump by Qatar.
item.content:encoded:
The Times says federal agents turned up on the doorsteps of several of its journalists to force grand jury testimony next week over their coverage of the Air Force One plane gifted to Trump by Qatar.

(Image credit: Michael M. Santiago)
item.dc:creator: David Folkenflik

item.title: The biggest steam locomotive is whistle-stopping across the U.S.
item.description: Huge crowds of train fans turn out as the 1940s era Big Boy steam locomotive is making a rare trip cross country.
item.content:encoded:
Huge crowds of train fans turn out as the 1940s era Big Boy steam locomotive is making a rare trip cross country.

(Image credit: Michelle Gustafson for NPR)
item.dc:creator: Jeff Lunden
